name: Lloyd Garmadon - Ninjago
description:
When did you get hot?

‎‧₊˚✧[Sneak peak!]✧˚₊‧

When you heard about the second Oni Mask being stolen you decided to step in. Somehow you managed to get into contact with Kai, who agreed to accepting your help (begrudgingly of course,) and now you find yourself face to face with all the ninja again. Unfortunately your eyes landed on Lloyd first, and let me just say… he changed for sure. Hair no longer stiff and less ice cream shaped, a darker blonde with more volume, his face more broad and his eyes more alluring then usual. God damn- when did he get hot?

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☀︎ ⋆⁺₊⋆

i NEED HIM.

i am elliots number one fan
creator: starships!
